discoveryMethod: Fresh public direct-site pass sourced from DuckDuckGo HTML results and verified with HTTP fetches; duplicate checks against mockups.json, master-send-board.json, and prior daily batches.

publicEvidence: Official homepage returned HTTP 200 over HTTPS
Homepage visibly contains Yext Knowledge Tags placeholder/editor text
First-page fetch found no tel link, mailto link, or form despite a request-a-call-back framing
selectedLeads.gmbPublicListingSignals: Search result identifies the business as a Dubuque roofing contractor; full profile fields were not independently verified in this pass.
selectedLeads.contactRoute: Official site request-a-call-back/contact route must be manually confirmed; no form submitted
selectedLeads.nearestMoneyLeak: A visible placeholder/editor message and an unclear first-page call route can make a roof-repair visitor hesitate or fail to reach the business.
selectedLeads.recommendedOffer: Helpful alert plus a focused mobile roof-repair contact-path cleanup; verify the real callback workflow before proposing any replacement copy.
selectedLeads.whyThisShouldClose: The observation is concrete, local, and fixable without claiming the whole site needs a rebuild.
selectedLeads.designDifferentiation: If later approved, use a roof-inspection triage/checklist composition centered on the verified contact workflow, not the recurring dark hero/form/cards template.
selectedLeads.visualQaNotes: No mockup: the placeholder is a strong alert, but approved roof-service priority, real imagery, and exact intake route were not verified. A generic emergency page would be premature.

draftCopy.contactFormScript: Hi Better Roofing team — I was checking Dubuque roofing service paths and noticed the homepage visibly includes a Yext Knowledge Tags placeholder/editor message. I also could not confirm a clear tap-to-call or working first-page request route from the public page. I did not submit anything; I can outline a small, no-obligation cleanup after confirming the right contact workflow. Worth polishing this up for you? Reply NO and I will not follow up.

qualityGateSummary: No new mockup created. Better Roofing LLC is the strongest future visual candidate because of the verified placeholder signal, but the exact intake route, owner-approved priority, and real imagery are not confirmed. The other four are better served by focused audits/service-page proposals until their priority service and assets are verified. All records remain revisionNeededBeforeOutreach=true.
